scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @aristotle/shared-types" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/shared-schemas" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/meta-authority-registry" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/policy-compiler" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/evidence-ledger" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/authority-router" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/witness-service" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/execution-gate" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/governance-kernel" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/simulation-engine" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/agent-os" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/http-gateway" "npm run dev -w @aristotle/console-ui"
scripts.enterprise:verify: npm run enterprise:preflight && npm run stack:verify
scripts.stack:verify: npm run stack:smoke && npm run validate:core
